title: Dungeonverse
description:
A modpack which seeks to bring a realistic, yet fantasy inspired look to minecraft, with over 490 mods, it's a vast collection of carefully picked mods. 
On your adventure you will come across hundreds of unique structures.
body:
**Overview: What Is Dungeonverse?**
Dungeonverse is a large-scale, RPG-focused Minecraft modpack built for those who want intense exploration, challenging combat, and a rich, fantasy-themed world full of dungeons, mythical creatures, and epic loot. Inspired by classic RPGs and modern action-adventure titles, this pack blends the old with the new to deliver a handcrafted survival experience full of quests, lore, and long-term progression.

**Core Features**
Massive World Overhaul
Biome Expansion: Explore a vast amount of different land formations from eerie whispering woods to volcanic wastelands.

**Dungeon & Structure Generation**
Explore over 100+ new structures via Dungeons Arise, YUNG's series, Mr's Dungeon Mods, Wabi-Sabi Structures, and Repurposed Structures.

**Fantasy Ecosystem**
Encounter countless custom mobs and wildlife.

**Combat & Weaponry**
Overhauled Combat Mechanics
Tons of Weapons & Gear

**Boss Battles & Endgame Threats**
Face down titanic threats from Bosses of Mass Destruction, Souls Weapons, Antique Beasts, and more. 

**Origins, Classes & Progression**
Choose from dozens of Origins and custom classes.

**Base Building & Immersion**
Decorate your base with many new blocks added with this modpack

**A much better atmosphere**
Upgraded atmosphere featuring: Ambient Sounds, LambDynamicLights, WaveyCapes, and Enhanced Visuals.
Weather effects, seasons, and decay via Immersive Weathering and Tough as Nails.

**Performance & Optimization**
Optimized using many of the Top optimization mods to ensure stability

Compatible with Replay Mod, Xaero's Minimap, and World Map for creators and streamers.

**!!Becasue of some mods mentioned above, you may be banned from some servers!!**

**Why You’ll like It**

✔️ Solo-friendly and server-ready

✔️ No tech mods – pure fantasy

✔️ Progression that feels earned

✔️ A living world worth exploring

✔️ Perfect for story-driven, roleplay, and adventure gameplay

**Ideal For**

-RPG fans

-Players who want an advanced fantasy survival

-Streamers & SMP hosts looking for a lore-rich world

-Builders and explorers alike.

-I'd appreciate if the modpack link is given in videos featuring this modpack

**Memory Requirements:**

6-10GB RAM minimum | 16-32GB RAM recommended

**Please make sure to adjust the RAM usage in the modrinth launcher**
